meaning: n.一回,一场,回合,较量vt.来回耕
examples: This bout of self-pity was getting me nowhere.
He was recovering from a severe bout of flu.
This will be his eighth title bout in 19 months.
Their bout was due to take place in the Finnish capital Helsinki on Saturday.
In 2007, Chagaev pulled out of a unification bout against then-WBO champion Sultan Ibragimov.
